title: dianthus serpentinus
intro: Dianthus serpentinus, also known as the serpent's barrow or snake's mouth, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and its antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dianthus serpentinus include its potential to treat urinary issues, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. Dianthus serpentinus can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and it is also sometimes used in folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
